evidence: https://github.com/PMBio/Health-Privacy-Challenge is the CAMDA 2026 ELSA Health Privacy Challenge starter package
decision_value: public starter package can over-promote a gated benchmark if not separated from real target data

evidence: README says datasets are downloaded from the ELSA benchmark platform after registration and signing a data download agreement
decision_value: actual challenge data is gated, not a public E2 denominator surface

evidence: Track I is blue-team generative methods vs red-team membership inference attacks for bulk RNA-seq synthetic data
decision_value: real MIA benchmark interface, but biomedical tabular not image-diffusion

evidence: Track II defines donor-level privacy for synthetic single-cell RNA-seq and uses donor-level score aggregation
decision_value: cross-domain privacy setting; needs separate consumer boundary

evidence: data/README.md describes TCGA-BRCA 1089x978 and TCGA-COMBINED 4323x978 preprocessing and points users to the ELSA platform for downloads
decision_value: dataset metadata is public but usable data access is platform-gated

evidence: Track I red-team README lists MC LOGAN GAN-Leaks calibrated GAN-Leaks DOMIAS KDE Confidence LR and Confidence RF and evaluates accuracy AUC AUPR and TPR at FPR 0.01 and 0.1
The repo exposes running_baseline_example.zip in the red-team folder and the prior evidence gate recomputed public example AUC 0.565453 with 1089 candidate rows
decision_value: public example is a sanity packet, not actual Noisy Diffusion challenge evidence

evidence: Track I blue-team config includes multivariate CVAE DP-CVAE CTGAN CVAE-GMM WGAN-GP and DP-CTGAN generator settings with CUDA-oriented configs
decision_value: generator code/config exists but does not publish actual challenge target packets

evidence: Track II privacy config uses onek1k membership labels and sc_domias_baselines for a Poisson subset example
decision_value: single-cell example is cross-domain and not current image-diffusion evidence

evidence: GitHub releases page exposes a release surface, and prior evidence recorded public example ZIPs, but no current public actual-challenge score packet is identified
decision_value: release/example visibility does not imply public target labels and score packets for the real challenge

evidence: Public starter examples and README tables expose metric contracts and example scores, but actual challenge labels, predictions, Noisy Diffusion targets, and metadata require platform access or participant submissions
decision_value: blocks external denominator and admitted evidence for the real benchmark

evidence: Keep as gated-benchmark and starter-metric false-promotion exemplar only; do not count as admitted row response/score asset external-audit denominator or compute release
decision_value: use for measurement-route baseline tagging, not execution
